tasks.subject: Task 1: CVE Note Removals
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete three hardcoded CVE/version-pin blocks from database and auth skills.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md` (line 56)
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md` (line 56)
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` (line 74)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `drizzle-orm 0.45.2` string is gone from both database skill files
- [ ] `better-auth` CVE block is gone from `nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md`
- [ ] No other content in those files changed

**Verify:** `grep -n "drizzle-orm 0.45\|better-auth.*1\.6\|Versions prior" skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md", "skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md", "skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n \"drizzle-orm 0.45\\|better-auth.*1\\.6\\|Versions prior\" skills/nestjs-add-database/SKILL.md skills/nextjs-add-database/SKILL.md skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["drizzle-orm 0.45.2 string gone from both database skills", "better-auth CVE block gone from nextjs-add-auth"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: IM8 Label Sweep — Auth Skills
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove all IM8 codes and attributions from the three auth skills, keeping the security guidance intact.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` (6 locations: lines 96, 120, 511, 520, 537, 538)
- Modify: `skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md` (3 locations: lines 56, 303, 328)
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md` (3 locations: lines 51, 276, 301)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No `IM8` string remains in any of the three files
- [ ] Rate limiting guidance, password length guidance, and Argon2id note are all still present
- [ ] NIST SP 800-63B reference is retained in all inline comments where it appeared alongside IM8

**Verify:** `grep -n "IM8" skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md", "skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md", "skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n \"IM8\" skills/nextjs-add-auth/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-add-auth/SKILL.md skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No IM8 string in any of the three auth skill files", "NIST SP 800-63B retained", "Argon2id note preserved", "rate limiting guidance preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: IM8 Label Sweep — Scaffold and Support Skills
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove all remaining IM8 references from scaffold skills and support skills.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/shared-add-logging/SKILL.md` (2 locations — header + body at lines 857-859)
- Modify: `AGENTS.md` (1 location — line 121)
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md` (2 locations — lines 215, 2551)
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md` (1 location — line 1766)
- Modify: `skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md` (3 locations — lines 785, 938, 1487)
- Modify: `skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md` (1 location — line 2993)
- Modify: `skills/shared-add-ai-security/SKILL.md` (1 location — line 271)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No `IM8` string remains in any of the seven files
- [ ] Log isolation guidance still present in `shared-add-logging/SKILL.md`
- [ ] File upload malware scanning note still present in `AGENTS.md`
- [ ] All four scaffold vault notes updated to vendor-neutral wording
- [ ] HSTS comments retain "HSTS" but drop IM8 code

**Verify:** `grep -n "IM8" skills/shared-add-logging/SKILL.md AGENTS.md skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/shared-add-ai-security/SKILL.md` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/shared-add-logging/SKILL.md", "AGENTS.md", "skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md", "skills/shared-add-ai-security/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n \"IM8\" skills/shared-add-logging/SKILL.md AGENTS.md skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/nestjs-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/vite-react-scaffold/SKILL.md skills/shared-add-ai-security/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No IM8 string in any of the seven files", "Log isolation guidance preserved", "Malware scanning note preserved", "Vault notes are vendor-neutral"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: OWASP 2025 Reference Audit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify all OWASP references in skill files are current for the 2025 ranking; correct any that cite stale 2021 rank numbers.

**Files:** All files containing `OWASP` (determined by grep at runtime).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No references to 2021-specific rank numbers that conflict with 2025 ranking
- [ ] `shared-add-ai-security` OWASP LLM Top 10 v2.0 reference unchanged

**Verify:** `grep -rn "OWASP" skills/ AGENTS.md` — review each match for stale rank numbers

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/**/*.md", "AGENTS.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -rn \"OWASP\" skills/ AGENTS.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No stale 2021 rank numbers cited alongside OWASP", "OWASP LLM Top 10 v2.0 reference unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Version Bump and CHANGELOG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bump plugin version to 2.3.0 and record Round 3 changes in CHANGELOG.md.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- Modify: `CHANGELOG.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `plugin.json` version is `"2.3.0"`
- [ ] CHANGELOG has `[2.3.0]` entry dated 2026-05-06
- [ ] Final `grep -rn "IM8" skills/ AGENTS.md` returns zero output

**Verify:** `grep '"version"' .claude-plugin/plugin.json && grep '\[2.3.0\]' CHANGELOG.md` → both return a match

```json:metadata
{"files": [".claude-plugin/plugin.json", "CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep '\"version\"' .claude-plugin/plugin.json && grep '\\[2.3.0\\]' CHANGELOG.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plugin.json version is 2.3.0", "CHANGELOG has [2.3.0] entry", "grep -rn IM8 skills/ AGENTS.md returns zero output"]}
```
